steps.title: Find the monthly rate
steps.content:
The shrub grows $57$ centimeters every $m$ months, so its average monthly growth rate is
$$\frac{57}{m}$$
centimeters per month.

steps.title: Convert years to months
steps.content: There are $12$ months in a year, so $k$ years is $12k$ months.

steps.title: Multiply rate by time
steps.content: Multiply the monthly rate by the number of months. $$\frac{57}{m}\cdot12k=\frac{684k}{m}$$ The answer is D.
